rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (5/10) and rest on the same substantive points: exceptional technical depth, GISCollective open-source impact, full-stack expertise, strong mentoring, and the same three concerns (basic German vs. C1 requirement, no UML/architecture leadership, no executive team/client management). The differences are purely cosmetic rewordings ('cross-domain'→'cross-platform', 'languages, platforms'→'diverse tech stacks') with no penalty, new concern, or shifted reasoning attributable to the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Wei Chen.
